title: Stunned
excerpt: A stunned creature is Incapacitated, automatically fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws, and attack rolls against it have Advantage.
markdown:
# Stunned

While you have the Stunned condition, you experience the following effects:

*   **Incapacitated.** You have the [[incapacitated_condition]].
*   **Saving Throws Affected.** You automatically fail Strength and Dexterity saving throws.
*   **Attacks Affected.** [[attack_roll|Attack rolls]] against you have [[advantage]].
